passed_names: CE — cancel escape before answering rebook question
IL — inline exception: service name answerable from DVs
RA — abandon: caller doesn't want to rebook → wrap_up silent
RB — reschedule bypass: reschedule_mode=true → reschedule_same, zero spoken
RD — route different: caller wants different service → reschedule_different
RS — route same: caller affirms rebook offer → reschedule_same
S1 — wrap-up signal at rebook offer
S2 — info pivot: pricing question at rebook offer
S3 — financial enquiry: billing message spoken, no tool call
UN — unknown category: asks for appointment type
